artifacts.sourceTitle: Data and AI Office | The General Administration of IT
artifacts.queryUsed: Prince Sattam Bin Abdulaziz University artificial intelligence policy site:psau.edu.sa OR site:psau.edu.sa/en
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official PSAU ITDL page on itdl.psau.edu.sa. It describes the university Data and AI Office, data governance policies, data protection, and promotion of AI. Used only for narrow governance/source-status claims, not for student AI-use rules.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Policies | The General Administration of IT
artifacts.queryUsed: Data and AI Office Policies itdl.psau.edu.sa
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official PSAU ITDL policies index. It lists official data and information policies, including data classification, data sharing, personal data protection, and open data. Used only for source-level privacy/data-policy availability.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Workshop Titled "Applications of Generative AI in E-Learning"
artifacts.queryUsed: site:psau.edu.sa/en "ChatGPT" OR "generative AI" OR "AI tools" "Prince Sattam"
artifacts.verificationNotes: Firecrawl failed with ERR_TUNNEL_CONNECTION_FAILED and direct HTTPS fetch could not connect to ddq.psau.edu.sa. Search result text indicated a workshop/news page, not durable policy evidence.

artifacts.verificationNotes: Official college news/training page about AI topics for students. It was rejected because it describes a training event and does not establish a university-wide policy or durable AI-use guidance.

methodsAttempted.query: Prince Sattam Bin Abdulaziz University artificial intelligence policy site:psau.edu.sa OR site:psau.edu.sa/en
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned an academic AI program page, college AI news pages, and the official Data and AI Office page.
Returned program and training pages plus a generic academic programs page; no university-wide AI-use policy was verified.

methodsAttempted.query: site:psau.edu.sa/en "ChatGPT" OR "generative AI" OR "AI tools" "Prince Sattam"
methodsAttempted.notes: Returned official AI training/workshop/news pages; these were rejected or inaccessible and not used for policy claims.

methodsAttempted.query: Data and AI Office Policies itdl.psau.edu.sa
methodsAttempted.notes: The Data and AI Office page linked to services and the ITDL navigation exposed the official Policies page.

methodsAttempted.query: Direct official HTTP fetches for PSAU candidate pages
methodsAttempted.notes: Direct fetch succeeded for ITDL Data and AI Office, ITDL Policies, CCES AI training news, CBAH AI initiative news, and the academic program page; DDQ subdomain could not be reached.

artifacts.summary: Discovery verified two official PSAU ITDL sources for narrow data/AI governance and data-policy availability claims. AI-related workshop, training, event, and program pages were not used to infer binding AI policy or university-wide academic rules.

artifacts.claimText: Prince Sattam Bin Abdulaziz University's ITDL site describes a Data and AI Office that works on data governance policies, data quality and integrity, data protection, and promotion of artificial intelligence aligned with national initiatives.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Data and AI Office governance scope

artifacts.sourceTitle: Data and AI Office | The General Administration of IT
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The office aims to organize and manage data within the university in an effective manner to ensure its quality, integrity, and sustainability... It works on establishing policies related to data governance... Strategic Objectives: Ensure data quality and integrity... Enhance data protection... Promote the use of artificial intelligence in alignment with national initiatives.

artifacts.title: Prince Sattam Bin Abdulaziz University AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: Official PSAU discovery verified the ITDL Data and AI Office page and ITDL Policies page. The staged claims are limited to data/AI governance office scope and listed data-policy documents. No university-wide student generative-AI use policy was verified from the official pages reviewed.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
AI-related official news, workshop, and program pages were rejected as event/news or low-specificity sources and were not used for policy claims.
The DDQ generative AI workshop page could not be fetched through Firecrawl or direct HTTPS during this run.
No claim in this bundle asserts a binding university-wide AI-use rule for students or staff.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
